form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on January 23 at Murray Bridge over 350m. Last start was second over 350m in 19.43, behind Crazed. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.comment: Looks close to another win after his success on January 23 at Murray Bridge over 350m. Last start was second over 350m in 19.43, behind Crazed. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked twice turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight beaten 2.25 lengths (16.98) behind Stifler in a Invitation on April 15. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight beaten 2.25 lengths (16.98) behind Stifler in a Invitation on April 15. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Raced with a dislodged muzzle.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Murray Bridge then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when sixth (20.31) at this track. Has ability but this tough and will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at Murray Bridge then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when sixth (20.31) at this track. Has ability but this tough and will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.31) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length fifth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.75 lengths over 342m at this track in a handy (19.62), beating Zing Matilda. Will find this a bit tougher, others hold stronger claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turn off back straight; Checked turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 342m. Last start finished 2nd on April 13 over 342m at this track behind Tenacious Design beaten 2.25 lengths (19.86) in a Grade 5. Has three victories from this draw. Looks a big chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was an impressive winner after leading throughout, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Invitation at Gawler. Rates a chance if runs up to recent winning time.
